thought.text: The comparison results are i1 which is fine for branches in LLVM 18. The issue with the `BranchInst::AssertOK` was that the Not was producing i32 from CreateNot (bitwise). Now it produces i1 properly. Let me build and test

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && cmake --build build -t task3 2>&1 | tail -3 && cmake --build build -t task3-score 2>&1 | grep "总分"

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && cmake --build build -t task3 2>&1 | tail -3 && cmake --build build -t task3-score 2>&1 | grep \"\u603b\u5206\"", "summary": "Build and score task3 after Not fix", "timeout": 300}

summary: Build and score task3 after Not fix
